title: Official vs. Parallel (Black-Market) USD Exchange Rate & the Gap
sources: wdi (PA.NUS.FCRF) + IMF IFS historical (1937-1949) for official; Bahmani-Oskooee (2005) monthly series (1979-2003) + secondary-compiled annual anchors (2004-2010) + TGJU daily data (2011-2026) for parallel
notes: Pre-1979 (Pahlavi era) the two series are expected to sit very close together (no meaningful parallel market under the pre-revolution convertible economy) -- watch for the gap opening sharply at the 1979 revolution, narrowing to ~0 during the genuinely unified 2002-2010 window, then reopening from ~2010-2011 onward with sanctions escalation. This chart exists specifically to make that story visible.
